summary: Implemented IC-1, IC-2, IC-3 as CI enforcement gates using shell script wrappers that run targeted kernel test suites. IC-1 runs restriction-monotonicity + restriction-eval tests (14 tests). IC-2 runs snapshot-hashing + restriction-compiler + dsl-parser-compiler tests (56 tests). IC-3 runs delegation-non-escalation tests (10 tests). All three pass. CI pipeline updated: all five IC checks (IC-1 through IC-5) are now real enforcement gates — zero stubs remain. invariant-checks.md updated to reflect full implementation status. The standalone TS enforcement scripts were replaced by test-runner wrappers because workspace package resolution requires vitest context.

verification.notes: IC-1: 14 tests pass. IC-2: 56 tests pass. IC-3: 10 tests pass. IC-4/IC-5: static checks pass. Zero CI stubs remain.
